channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Is that food really 100% avocado oil? Probably not
item.description: A new study suggests consumers paying a premium for avocado oil products may not be getting what they expect.

item.title: Iran-backed Houthis announce Red Sea blockade; Cyclospora source still unknown
item.description: Iran-backed Houthis say they will blockade a Red Sea waterway. Meanwhile, the FDA continues investigating Taylor Farms lettuce as a possible Cyclospora source.

item.title: Nicaragua's President Ortega announces end to elections, extending his 20-year rule
item.description: The move cancels Nicaragua's next elections, originally set for November 2027.

item.title: NPR staff picks the best games of 2026 so far
item.description: Major titles like Resident Evil Requiem and Crimson Desert lead the first half of the gaming year, alongside early-access sequels such as Slay the Spire 2.
